Any.name: Friend in Need
Any.description: Join a faction.

Any.name: Time is on our side
Any.description: Reach 1948.

Any.name: We'll Build it in a Day
Any.description: Research Construction V.

Any.name: Transport Tycoon
Any.description: Have at least 1000 convoys.

Any.name: Destroyer of Worlds
Any.description: Deploy a nuke.

Any.name: Wunderwaffen
Any.description: Has completed the Special Projects Nuclear Fission Bomb, Rocket Interceptor and Jet Engines.

Any.name: Master of War
Any.description: Fully research a land, air and naval doctrine tree.

Any.name: Mine is bigger than yours
Any.description: Lead a faction with at least 20 members.

Any.name: No country for old men
Any.description: Reach 0 manpower with Scraping the Barrel as Conscription Law.

Any.name: New World Order
Any.description: Make all nations fascist.

Any.name: Cut The Strings
Any.description: Break free from your overlord as a puppet.

Any.name: The Puppetmaster
Any.description: Have at least 51 subjects.

Any.name: Lethal Straight
Any.description: Have a production license from at least 5 of the 7 major powers.

Any.name: Sun Tzu Reborn
Any.description: As Any Chinese Nation, have a level 9 field marshal.

Any.name: Battlecry
Any.description: As a warlord, conquer all of China and Japan.

Any.name: Panda-monium
Any.description: As a warlord, be at war with all Chinese nations simultaneously.

Any.name: Make a Man Out Of You
Any.description: As a Warlord, have at least 1,000,000 manpower queued up for deployment.

Any.name: Do You Mined?
Any.description: Lay at least 1,000 mines on the coastline of an enemy nation.

Any.name: Play It, Sam
Any.description: Have a spy network of at least 50% strength in Casablanca.

Any.name: I SEE EVERYTHING
Any.description: Get over 90% intel in each category on a major without using code cracking.

Any.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
Any.description: Successfully stage a coup in any nation using a spy with the Seducer trait.

Any.name: Listen Very Carefully, I Shall Say This...
Any.description: Have a French and British spy work together on the same Operation.

Any.name: Man of a Thousand Faces, Every One the Same
Any.description: Have the same spy get captured twice.

Any.name: You Will Never Kill Me Alive
Any.description: Have one of your spies take a Suicide Pill.

Any.name: Around Eurasia in 80 days
Any.description: Make a railroad from Gibraltar to Singapore.

Any.name: By merit alone
Any.description: Promote a Unit Commander to a general, and reach max level.

Any.name: Satisfactory
Any.description: Have at least one MIO per category at level 10+.

Any.name: Manifesting a Better Tomorrow
Any.description: Reach 100% faction manifest fulfilment.

Any.name: Doctrine of Choice
Any.description: Complete three subdoctrines in the same track.

Afghanistan.name: Graveyard of Empires
Afghanistan.description: As Afghanistan, Iran, Iraq or the Raj, control all of the other three nations' starting provinces.

Afghanistan.name: This achievement is dedicated to the brave soldiers of...
Afghanistan.description: As Afghanistan, capitulate the Soviet Union.

Afghanistan.name: I have the high ground
Afghanistan.description: As Afghanistan, control all Himalayan states.

Afghanistan.name: Savior of the holy lands
Afghanistan.description: As Afghanistan, become the owner of Palestine and Mecca.

Argentina.name: Rumble in the Jungle
Argentina.description: Own all Amazon states as any South American nation.

Argentina.name: Bad Ending - The whole world is now Brazil
Argentina.description: Control every state in the world.

Argentina.name: Islas Malvinas
Argentina.description: As Argentina, hold the Falkland Islands and South Georgia for 73 days consecutively.

Argentina.name: Lamento Boliviano
Argentina.description: As Argentina, own all of Latin America except Bolivia.

Argentina.name: Cisplatine War 2, Electric Boogaloo
Argentina.description: As Either Brazil or Argentina, be in a faction with Uruguay while at war with Brazil/Argentina.

Argentina.name: Reconquistadors
Argentina.description: As Argentina or Chile, have a Conquistadors national spirit active while holding all Spanish Cores.

Australia.name: The weapons of the Third Emu War

Australia.name: Rule Britannia
Australia.description: As any British Subject state, conquer all of Britain.

Australia.name: Australia-Hungary
Australia.description: As Australia, own all core territory of Hungary.

Austria.name: Antischluss
Austria.description: As Austria, control all German starting states.

Austria.name: No Friends, Only Family
Austria.description: As Austria or Hungary led by a Habsburg Monarch, Control the Swiss Plateau and have at least three other countries be led by a member of the Habsburg family.

Austria.name: Otto-man
Austria.description: As Austria or Hungary, led by Otto von Habsburg, control the starting states of Austria, Hungary, Czechoslovakia, Romania, Bulgaria, Greece and Turkey as well as the states in Polish Galicia, Slovenia and Croatia.

Austria.name: Brentry
Austria.description: As Austria, Belgium or the Netherlands be the leader of the EU and have the United Kingdom join your faction.

Belgium.name: Brentry
Belgium.description: As Austria, Belgium or the Netherlands be the leader of the EU and have the United Kingdom join your faction.

Belgium.name: Spaak of Genius
Belgium.description: As Belgium, with Paul-Henri Spaak as country leader, research at least 10 different Special Projects.

Belgium.name: The 501st Legion
Belgium.description: As Belgium, have the National Spirit “Rexist Legion” and be in control of all of your starting neighbors’ Capitals.

Bolivia.name: Rumble in the Jungle

Bolivia.description: As any communist South or central American country, occupy Washington D.C.

Bolivia.name: URSAL
Bolivia.description: Be Communist and own all of South America.

Brazil.name: Rumble in the Jungle
Brazil.description: Own all Amazon states as any South American nation.

Brazil.name: And the snake smoked

Brazil.name: Bad Ending - The whole world is now Brazil
Brazil.description: Control every state in the world.

Brazil.name: I'm Home!
Brazil.description: As Brazil occupy every core of Portugal.

Brazil.name: Proactive Defense
Brazil.description: As any communist South or central American country, occupy Washington D.C.

Brazil.name: The Merry Band
Brazil.description: As communist brazil ruled by Lampião, occupy Nottingham.

Brazil.name: URSAL
Brazil.description: Be Communist and own all of South America.

Brazil.name: Snakes on a plane
Brazil.description: As Brazil, capture Rome with paratroopers.

Brazil.name: Cisplatine War 2, Electric Boogaloo
Brazil.description: As Either Brazil or Argentina, be in a faction with Uruguay while at war with Brazil/Argentina.

British Raj.name: Our Words Are Backed With Nuclear Weapons
British Raj.description: As India, develop and deploy a nuke. You must have the Quit India Movement national spirit.

British Raj.name: Rule Britannia
British Raj.description: As any British Subject state, conquer all of Britain.

British Raj.name: Spies Trade
British Raj.description: As India, become the spymaster for the Allies.

British Raj.name: Graveyard of Empires
British Raj.description: As Afghanistan, Iran, Iraq or the Raj, control all of the other three nations' starting provinces.

British Raj.description: As the East India Company, own Suez and Panama.

British Raj.description: As the Mughal Empire, complete Agency Upgrade Psychological Warfare, become Spy Master and have at least 8 operatives.

British Raj.name: Oh, how the turntables
British Raj.description: As India puppet the UK with Churchill as it's leader.

British Raj.name: I'm just passing by
British Raj.description: Own a state on each continent while being at peace.

British Raj.name: I shall either find a way or make one
British Raj.description: Control Rome and have an elephant unit in the state.

Bulgaria.name: I Captured the Bosporus and All I Got Was This Lousy Achievement
Bulgaria.description: As Greece or Bulgaria, own both sides of the Bosporus. As Turkey, subjugate both Greece & Bulgaria.

Bulgaria.name: Prussia of the Balkans

Bulgaria.description: As Communist Bulgaria, form the United Balkan Federation and own all Balkan states as cores.

Bulgaria.name: Master Puppeteer
Bulgaria.description: As Bulgaria, complete the focus The Fate of the Balkans while having 5 or more Balkan puppets.

Bulgaria.name: Now This is Getting Childish

Canada.name: Braaaaains!

Canada.name: It's 1812 All Over Again
Canada.description: As Canada, take and hold Washington D.C.

Canada.name: Rule Britannia
Canada.description: As any British Subject state, conquer all of Britain.

Chile.name: King of What?

Chile.name: True Condor Legion
Chile.description: As CHL, BOL, PRU, ECU, VEN, COL - Sent volunteers to Germany.

Chile.name: Chilean Empire
Chile.description: Control all mainland states that border the pacific in South America, North America and Asia.

Chile.name: Reconquistadors
Chile.description: As Argentina or Chile, have a Conquistadors national spirit active while holding all Spanish Cores.

Chile.name: Hispanics of the world, unite!
Chile.description: As Chile, form the Hispanic Alliance and have at least 8 "Hispanic" nations in your faction.

Chile.name: America Decolonized!

China.name: Awake and Angry
China.description: As China, reconquer all of China and Manchuria and force a Japanese surrender.

China.name: Romance of the Three Kingdoms
China.description: As China, puppet and then annex Yunnan and Guangxi Clique.

China.name: Its all coming together

China.name: The Coast is Clear
China.description: As China, never lose a starting coastal state before 1945.9.2.

China.name: A Fullmetal Brotherhood
China.description: As Fascist China, control 300 Steel, Tungsten and Chromium.

China.name: Genghis Khan't
China.description: As any Chinese country or Manchukuo, own and control all Mongolian core states.

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: Sun Tzu Reborn

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: The People Have Stood Up!

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: Made in China
Chinese Soviet Republic.description: As Communist China, have over 100 military factories.

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: Battle Royale
Chinese Soviet Republic.description: As Communist China, fight both China and Japan before 1940 within 90 days of being at war with the other, and capitulate them both.

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: The Winner takes it all
Chinese Soviet Republic.description: As PRC owns and controls all starting Chinese core states.

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: Master Infiltrator
Chinese Soviet Republic.description: As PRC, don't expand beyond Yan'an, and infiltrate at least 5 Chinese states and flip them to your control when attacking the rest of China.

Chinese Soviet Republic.name: Genghis Khan't
Chinese Soviet Republic.description: As any Chinese country or Manchukuo, own and control all Mongolian core states.

Colombia.name: My Ships Don't Lie
Colombia.description: As Colombia, form Gran Colombia and have 10 Carriers and 10 Battleships.

Colombia.name: Rumble in the Jungle
Colombia.description: Own all Amazon states as any South American nation.

Colombia.name: Proactive Defense
Colombia.description: As any communist South or central American country, occupy Washington D.C.

Colombia.name: URSAL
Colombia.description: Be Communist and own all of South America.

Colombia.name: True Condor Legion
Colombia.description: As CHL, BOL, PRU, ECU, VEN, COL - Sent volunteers to Germany.

Czechoslovakia.name: The Munich Disagreement

Czechoslovakia.name: Czechmate

Denmark.name: Northern Light
Denmark.description: As a Scandinavian country form your own faction, and have Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Finland in it.

Denmark.name: Everything is awesome.
Denmark.description: As Denmark, get Maximum Welfare Spending after January 1st 1941 without being puppeted or capitulating.

Egypt.name: Freegypt
Egypt.description: As Egypt, go from puppet to a free nation using the autonomy system.

Estonia.name: It has my name on it

Ethiopia.name: The Lion that Roared
Ethiopia.description: As Ethiopia, without being in a faction, force the Italians to make peace. Again.

Ethiopia.name: The Lion King

Ethiopia.name: This time for Africa

Finland.name: Northern Light
Finland.description: As a Scandinavian country form your own faction, and have Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Finland in it.

Finland.name: Finnish Him!
Finland.description: As Finland, defeat the Soviet Union without joining a faction.

Finland.name: Two Arms Against Tyranny
Finland.description: As Finland, capitulate the Soviet Union while having a 2 country faction with another Nordic.

Finland.name: Uralic brothers united
Finland.description: As Finland, have Hungary, Estonia, Sapmi, Karelia, Mari El, Udmurtia, Komi, Ostyak-Vogulia, Yamalia and Nenetsia as subjects.

Finland.name: Lone Wolf
Finland.description: As Finland, form Greater Finland and own every core and claim without having ever joined a faction.

Finland.name: No one crosses the finnish line

France.name: Vive la France

France.name: Big Entente

France.name: Vive la Jeune Ecole

France.name: Die, Perfidious Albion!

Germany.name: Monarchy is Back in Fashion

Germany.name: Our Other Place in the Sun

Germany.name: Team America

Germany.name: Why Die For Danzig?

Germany.name: By Beer Alone

Germany.name: Nothing personal, Adolf

Germany.name: Naval Arms Race

Germany.name: Weltpolitik

Greece.name: I Captured the Bosporus and All I Got Was This Lousy Achievement

Greece.name: Istanbul is Constantinople. Again.

Greece.name: This is Madness!

Greece.name: Hellenic Civility
Greece.description: Win the Greek Civil War before 1937.

Greece.name: Freedom or Death

Greece.name: Pesky Greeks

Better than the Szent István

Hungary.name: No Friends, Only Family

Hungary.name: Otto-man
Hungary.description: As Austria or Hungary, led by Otto von Habsburg, control the starting states of Austria, Hungary, Czechoslovakia, Romania, Bulgaria, Greece and Turkey as well as the states in Polish Galicia, Slovenia and Croatia.

Hungary.name: The Lenin Boys are Back in Town
Hungary.description: As Communist Hungary bring back the Lenin-fiúk and take control over Leningrad.

Hungary.name: A Great Hunger

Hungary.name: Uralic brothers united
Hungary.description: As Finland, have Hungary, Estonia, Sapmi, Karelia, Mari El, Udmurtia, Komi, Ostyak-Vogulia, Yamalia and Nenetsia as subjects.

Iran.name: Graveyard of Empires

Iran.name: Pesky Greeks

Iran.name: The Sands of Time

Iran.name: The Legacy of Cyrus the Great

Iran.name: From Tehran with Love

Iraq.name: Graveyard of Empires
Iraq.description: As Afghanistan, Iran, Iraq or the Raj, control all of the other three nations' starting provinces.

Iraq.name: Cradle of Civilization
Iraq.description: As Iraq, build the maximum infrastructure level in all core states and achieve 100% stability.

Iraq.name: Revenge for 1925

Iraq.name: Avenging the Sack of Baghdad

Italy.name: Duce Nuked'em

Italy.name: Stalin, how many guns does he have?

Italy.name: Pizza Time!
Italy.description: As Italy, occupy New York, Chicago and Hawaii.

Italy.name: Collect all the Romes
Italy.description: As Italy, continue holding onto the First Rome, and gain the second and third Rome.

Italy.name: Nothing personal, Adolf
Italy.description: As Italy, take Austria before the Anschluss and never enter a faction with a fascist Germany.

Italy.name: Not today

Japan.name: Tojo Shot First
Japan.description: As Japan, Nuke a core territory of the US before the US develops nuclear weapons.

Japan.name: Sunrise Invasion

Japan.name: Pride and Extreme Prejudice

Japan.name: The Sun Will Never Set

Manchukuo.name: The Dragon Swallowed the Sun

Manchukuo.name: The Good, the Bad and the Weird
Manchukuo.description: As Manchukuo, have max level infrastructure in every owned state and generate at least 15 units of oil.

Manchukuo.name: Genghis Khan't
Manchukuo.description: As any Chinese country or Manchukuo, own and control all Mongolian core states.

Mexico.name: Sunset Invasion

Mexico.name: The Revenge of Montezuma

Mexico.name: The New Home of the Revolution

Mexico.name: Norway Jose
Mexico.description: As Norway, own and control every Mexican core.

Netherlands.name: United Netherlands

Netherlands.name: Treading the Narrow Path
Netherlands.description: As the Netherlands, do not cave to the Germans, continue the Zuiderzee works, and do not lose control of any of your continental European states until 1945.

Netherlands.name: Putting the Raid on the Medway to Shame

Netherlands.name: Bevrijding
Netherlands.description: As the Netherlands, liberate the continental Netherlands after relocating the government to the East Indies.

Netherlands.name: Brentry
Netherlands.description: As Austria, Belgium or the Netherlands be the leader of the EU and have the United Kingdom join your faction.

Norway.name: Northern Light
Norway.description: As a Scandinavian country form your own faction, and have Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Finland in it.

Norway.name: Norway Jose
Norway.description: As Norway, own and control every Mexican core.

Norway.name: Pinot Noirway
Norway.description: As Norway, own and control the state of Bourgogne.

Norway.name: Cheese your fighter.

Philippines.name: The Juannines

Philippines.name: Declare Military Emergency
Philippines.description: Have a Military Emergency declared in the Philippines.

Philippines.name: Cobalt Sea
Philippines.description: As the Philippines, launch nuclear missiles from a nuclear submarine.

Poland.name: Poland Can Into Space
Poland.description: Has completed the Special Project Rocket Interceptor.

Poland.name: No more Partitions
Poland.description: As Poland, be independent and ensure that both Germany and the USSR are either in your faction or don’t exist.

Poland.name: Habsburgs. Habsburgs everywhere
Poland.description: As Poland, install a Habsburg monarch and be in a faction with another Habsburg monarch.

Poland.name: Crusader Kings III
Poland.description: As Poland, crown a King (or Queen) and capture Jerusalem.

Poland.name: Poland Peasant Revolution
Poland.description: As Poland, have the Peasant’s Strike overthrow the government.

Poland.name: 30 Minutes of Hel
Poland.description: As Poland in the 1939 “Blitzkrieg” scenario start, inflict over 1,800,000 casualties to Germany to beat the 2018 PDXCON HOI4 challenge. Extra bragging rights if you do it in 30 minutes or less!

Poland.name: Warszawo, Walcz!
Poland.description: Stage the Warsaw uprising and succeed.

Portugal.name: BFFs

Portugal.name: Go Ahead, Macau My Day
Portugal.description: As Portugal, create a collaboration government in Macau and have it own all Chinese states.

Romania.name: Death or Dishonor or Cake
Romania.description: As Romania, own a slice of all your starting neighbors.

Romania.name: Neither Death nor Dishonor
Romania.description: As Romania, make it to 1942 with all the states you started it with and control either Moscow or Berlin.

Romania.name: Assuming Direct Control
Romania.description: Starting as a minor power, assume faction leadership of the Allies, the Axis, or the Comintern.

Romania.name: Totally Not Cool, Bromania
Romania.description: As Romania, change sides in the war and capitulate a former ally.

Romania.name: Dracula’s Revenge
Romania.description: As Yugoslavia, establish the autonomous region of Transylvania and have it own all Romanian cores.

South Africa.name: District 9

South Africa.name: Crusader Kings
South Africa.description: As South Africa, finish the A King for our People focus and take Jerusalem.

South Africa.name: Crusader Kings 2

South Africa.name: Rule Britannia
South Africa.description: As any British Subject state, conquer all of Britain.

South Africa.name: I Am the Tong Master
South Africa.description: As South Africa, break free from the UK and puppet another nation.

Soviet Union.name: The Revolution Triumphant
Soviet Union.description: Have Germany as a puppet of Soviet.

Soviet Union.name: The Pope? How many Divisions does he have?
Not a step back!
Soviet Union.description: As the Soviet Union never lose 1 core territory to anyone before 1945.

Soviet Union.name: One Step Forward
Soviet Union.description: As Soviet Union declare a war on Poland and Germany before Germany attacks Poland.

Soviet Union.name: The Soviet Onion
Soviet Union.description: As the Soviet Union, have only puppets as neighbors.

Soviet Union.name: The Romanovs Laugh Last
Soviet Union.description: Restore the Romanovs to the throne and conquer Germany, Hungary, Austria, Czechoslovakia, Turkey, and Bulgaria.

Soviet Union.name: We don't really like statistics
Soviet Union.description: As the Soviet Union under Stalin, conquer Germany while suffering less than 1 million casualties total.

Soviet Union.name: Race for Germany
Soviet Union.description: As the Soviet union, capitulate Germany after the fall of France before the Allies control one German core state.

Soviet Union.name: Just proper gander
Soviet Union.description: As the Soviet Union, activate 30 propaganda campaigns before 1945.

Soviet Union.name: Stalin, how many guns does he have?
Soviet Union.description: As the pope, capitulate the USSR.

Soviet Union.name: Tsar Bomba
Soviet Union.description: As Tsarist Russia complete the Special Project for Thermonuclear bombs.

Spain.name: Nobody expects...

Spain.name: The bell tolls for us

Spain.name: One King, Two Crowns

Spain.name: Well, I Didn’t Vote for You

Spain.name: Our Chief Weapon is Surprise...
Spain.description: As Spain, have at least 5 spies and stage 5 coups against other nations.

Sweden.name: Northern Light
Sweden.description: As a Scandinavian country form your own faction, and have Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Finland in it.

Sweden.name: En Svensk Tiger
Sweden.description: As Sweden, acquire a production license for a Tiger or Tiger II tank from Germany.

Sweden.name: Danzig queen
Sweden.description: As Sweden, own and control Danzig.

Sweden.name: The return of the king
Sweden.description: As the exiled King of Gotland, retake mainland Sweden.

Sweden.name: The Magic School Bus
Sweden.description: With the Per Albin Bus, drive to Cape Town.

Switzerland.name: …and you get a canton, everybody gets a canton!
I’m not locked in here with you…
Switzerland.description: As Switzerland, declare war on Germany and win.

Switzerland.name: Swiss Cheese
Switzerland.description: As Switzerland annex 5 states that are not contiguous with each other or Switzerland.

Switzerland.name: You Shall Not Pass
Switzerland.description: As Switzerland win a defensive war without ever losing Western Swiss Alps, Eastern Swiss Alps or Ticino.

Turkey.name: I Captured the Bosporus and All I Got Was This Lousy Achievement
Turkey.description: As Greece or Bulgaria, own both sides of the Bosporus. As Turkey, subjugate both Greece & Bulgaria.

Turkey.name: We’re Putting the Band Back Together
Turkey.description: As Turkey, be in a faction with Germany and Austria-Hungary.

Turkey.name: Hardly Anything Sèvres
Turkey.description: As the Ottoman Empire, hold the capitals of France, the United Kingdom, Italy, and Japan.

Turkey.name: One Nation Under Atatürk, Indivisible
Turkey.description: As non-aligned Turkey, have zero negative state modifiers.

United Kingdom.name: One Empire
United Kingdom.description: Unite the entire world under the British Empire.

United Kingdom.name: The Empire Strikes Back
United Kingdom.description: As Britain, declare war on one of your former subjects.

United Kingdom.name: Rule Britannia
United Kingdom.description: As any British Subject state, conquer all of Britain.

United Kingdom.name: Last for a Thousand Years
United Kingdom.description: As the United Kingdom, accomplish the federation of the entire British Empire.

United Kingdom.name: Britzkrieg
United Kingdom.description: As the United Kingdom, put Edward VIII in power, ally Germany and fully control Paris.

United Kingdom.name: Nothing Wrong with our Bloody Ships
United Kingdom.description: As the United Kingdom, have at least 9 battlecruisers.

United Kingdom.name: William Wallis
United Kingdom.description: As the United Kingdom, put Edward VIII in power, enforce an American monarchy, and have both it and Scotland as subjects.

United Kingdom.name: Crush the Dream
United Kingdom.description: As a Communist United Kingdom, crush the American Dream by puppeting the U.S.A.

United Kingdom.name: Turing Complete!
United Kingdom.description: Fully decrypt all nations in the Axis.

United Kingdom.name: Brentry
United Kingdom.description: As Austria, Belgium or the Netherlands be the leader of the EU and have the United Kingdom join your faction.

United Kingdom.name: Backfire
United Kingdom.description: As the United Kingdom complete the Special Project for Medium Range Ballistic Missiles, have a rocket site, and be at war with Germany.

United States.name: Team America
United States.description: As the U.S.A., drop a nuclear bomb on Paris.

United States.name: History Repeated Itself
United States.description: As the U.S.A., Win against the Confederate States. Again.

United States.name: Georgia On My Mind
United States.description: As the U.S.A., own and fully control all three Georgias.

United States.name: To Arms in Dixie!
United States.description: As the U.S.A., start a new civil war as the South.

United States.name: Arsenal of Democracy
United States.description: As the U.S.A., have more than 300 military factories.

United States.name: Underpaid, Undersexed, and Under Eisenhower
United States.description: As the U.S.A., assume faction leadership of the Allies, and have over 50 expeditionary divisions from the United Kingdom.

United States.name: Woman in a High Castle
United States.description: As Germany with a female leader either annex the USA, including Alaska and Hawaii or have an American puppet that owns all the American starting states, including Alaska and Hawaii.

United States.name: American Prometheus
United States.description: As the USA have Robert Oppenheimer complete the Manhattan Project.

Yugoslavia.name: Huge-oslavia
Yugoslavia.description: As Yugoslavia, occupy all your neighbouring countries (Austria, Hungary, Romania, Bulgaria, Albania, Italy and Greece).

Yugoslavia.name: The Balkan Powder Keg
Yugoslavia.description: As Yugoslavia, start the Second World War (i.e. be part of either the Axis or the Allies and at war with the other faction in a war you started).

Yugoslavia.name: Peter’s Pride
Yugoslavia.description: As Peter II of Yugoslavia, overthrow your uncle and become King.

Yugoslavia.name: Dracula’s Revenge
Yugoslavia.description: As Yugoslavia, establish the autonomous region of Transylvania and have it own all Romanian cores.

Yugoslavia.name: Now This is Getting Childish
Yugoslavia.description: As Yugoslavia or Bulgaria, be at war while both countries are ruled by a child.
